subcodes.first_line: This is a wondrous remembrance from God, the Lord of all worlds, that through it may be attracted the hearts of such servants as are held back by their desires [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر بدیع من الله رب العالمین لینجذب به قلوب العباد الذین منعتهم اهوآئهم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
